title: athyrium achilleifolium
intro: Athyrium achilleifolium, also known as the Yushan maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. It is native to Taiwan and is known for its medicinal properties, which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its extracts have been shown to possess antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the Athyrium achilleifolium fern can be dried and used as a tea, while the roots can be processed into a decoction or infusion.
